mods.name: High-Flow Intake System
mods.description: Replace the stock airbox with a performance intake for improved turbo spool and a more audible whoosh from the K20C1 turbo engine.
mods.partNumbers: PRL Motorsports Cobra Intake, Mishimoto MMAI-CTR-17
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox and accordion hose. Install new intake tube and filter. Ensure MAF sensor connector is secure. 15 minutes. No tune required for stock turbo.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust System
mods.description: A performance catback adds volume and character to the K20C1 turbo engine while reducing backpressure for small power gains.
mods.partNumbers: Invidia Q300 HS17CTR3GM, AWE Track Edition 3020-42076
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the rear of the front pipe. Triple-exit design matches factory bumper openings. No cutting required. 1 hour on jack stands.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the FK8 by 20–25mm for reduced body roll and a more aggressive stance. The adaptive dampers remain fully functional.
mods.partNumbers: Swift Spec-R Springs, Eibach Pro-Kit E10-40-036-01-22
mods.installNotes: Spring compressor required. Dual-axis front struts make this slightly more involved than typical. Alignment mandatory. No coding needed for adaptive damper compatibility.

mods.name: Hondata FlashPro Tune
mods.description: The FlashPro is the gold standard for K20C1 tuning. Stage 1 adds 30–40hp with stock hardware. Full custom tunes can push 350+ whp with supporting mods.
mods.partNumbers: Hondata FlashPro FK8, USB cable included
mods.installNotes: Plug into OBD-II port and flash via laptop. Start with a conservative base map on 93 octane. Log data runs to verify AFR and knock levels. Custom dyno tune recommended for Stage 2+.

mods.name: Front-Mount Intercooler
mods.description: The stock intercooler is undersized for track use. A front-mount upgrade drops intake temps by 30–50 degrees F and prevents heat soak during hard driving.
mods.partNumbers: PRL Motorsports Street Intercooler, Mishimoto MMINT-CTR-17
mods.installNotes: Remove front bumper and stock intercooler. New unit bolts to factory mounting points. Larger core with stock-style charge pipes. Retune recommended for optimal results. 3 hour install.

mods.name: Performance Downpipe
mods.description: Replace the restrictive stock downpipe with a high-flow catted or catless unit for faster turbo spool and 15–25hp gains when tuned.
mods.installNotes: Access from below. Pre-soak turbo-to-downpipe bolts with penetrant. Must retune with Hondata after install. Catless will trigger CEL without tune. 2 hour install on a lift.

mods.name: Upgraded Turbocharger
mods.description: Swap the stock turbo for a larger unit capable of supporting 400–500whp. The stock K20C1 bottom end can handle this power level reliably.
mods.partNumbers: PRL Motorsports P600 Drop-In Turbo, Garrett G25-550
mods.installNotes: Drop-in turbo upgrades use the stock manifold and plumbing. Requires upgraded fuel injectors, HPFP, and custom Hondata tune. Upgraded clutch mandatory. Budget 12+ hours for install and tuning.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Purpose-built coilovers designed for the FK8's unique dual-axis front strut geometry, offering track-ready handling without compromising street manners.
mods.installNotes: Must use FK8-specific coilovers that accommodate the dual-axis strut. Standard coilovers will not fit correctly. Set ride height 15–20mm below stock. Full alignment mandatory.
